original_statement: what is the number of victories won by carl fogarty in 1999?
mutated_statement: what is the number of successes had by someone in 1999?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Lexical substitution + Verb substitution: Proper name replaced by indefinite pronoun | "victories" → "successes" | "won" → "had" (carl fogarty → someone | victories → successes | won → had)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的内容识别关键信息：judge_thought写道“表格将‘victories’作为成功的衡量，在1999年（第5行）Carl Fogarty记录了11次victories，因此1999年的successes是11”。Agent的具体表现是直接将变异问题中的泛指“someone”和“successes/had”映射回原始实体和字段，执行simple_query并返回具体答案11，且未在任何位置提及问题存在不确定性或要求澄清。因为Agent既没有指出指令模糊性也没有请求更多信息，而是把问题当作明确指向Carl Fogarty的查询来处理，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
